topics.title: EPA 2 Years Homicide-Free — The Peninsula Narrative Reset

priority_axes.note: Strong across all three — reason this ranks #1 this week.

topics.time_decay_note: Story broke April 17 — Monday ship maximizes news window.
topics.justification_notes: Breaking news pinned to Monday. Counter-narrative the Peninsula media isn't covering. EPA +1.7% YoY vs SMC -7.2% YoY — blue-ocean data angle. GSC shows 15+ home-value queries for Peninsula cities getting zero clicks — content gap you can rank for.

topics.title: Bay Area Mortgage Rate Update: 6.37% and What It Means

priority_axes.note: Rate content converts well for mortgage-curious buyers. Saturated topic, fast-moving — ship same week rates move.

topics.time_decay_note: Rate relevance decays fast — ship within 7 days of rate move.
topics.justification_notes: Rates hit 6.37% on April 18, creating fresh news hook. GSC shows 'bay area mortgage rates' as rising query. Refi-math breakdown gives viewers an actionable angle. Saturated topic but YOUR angle (local + buyer-power math) is differentiated.

topics.title: East Palo Alto Q2 2026 Price Breakdown by Neighborhood

priority_axes.note: Data/market content is #1 lane (1,720 avg reach). High engagement, solid business value for buyer leads.

topics.time_decay_note: Q2 quarterly data stays relevant for ~6 weeks until Q3 starts.
topics.justification_notes: Data/market is your top-performing lane. Wednesday placement per data: data content peaks on IG mid-week. Conflict flag: shares EPA market + Pillar 5 with Monday's EPA Homicide-Free topic — intentional pairing this week (narrative Monday + data Wednesday) but flag for visibility.

topics.title: What $5M Buys: Atherton vs Palo Alto vs Menlo Park

priority_axes.note: TOFU luxury content — low direct business, decent brand/authority play, moderate engagement.

topics.time_decay_note: No time pressure — could hold for a different week if you want higher-scoring content.
topics.justification_notes: Borderline consider. Scores below the 17 strong threshold but ships anyway because TOFU slot in weekly mix needs filling. Luxury comp content gets saves on IG. Alternative: swap for a BOFU topic if Peter's schedule permits.

topics.title: California Smoke & CO Detector Law: Seller Compliance Guide

priority_axes.note: Very high business priority — 15+ GSC queries ranking 13-76 with zero clicks. Pure content-gap SEO win.

topics.time_decay_note: Compliance content ages well — anchors the blog SEO for months.
topics.justification_notes: Pure content gap — GSC shows 35+ impressions across smoke/CO detector queries but zero clicks because competitor headlines aren't compelling. Competitive Gap=5 (no one in your market ranks long-form on this). Friday placement anchors the newsletter send (Fri evening).
